signals.headline: OKC Thunder Win 2025 NBA Finals in Game 7 Over Pacers (103-91)** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]
signals.raw:
OKC Thunder Win 2025 NBA Finals in Game 7 Over Pacers (103-91)** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]

The Oklahoma City Thunder secured their first franchise title since relocating, defeating the Indiana Pacers in Game 7 of the 2025 NBA Finals behind Shai Gilgeous-Alexander's MVP performance and a dominant third quarter (34-20 run)[1].
